telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.description: Connects Magi to Telegram as a bot, so you can chat with Magi and receive responses directly in Telegram.

bot_token.label: Bot Token
bot_token.description: The Bot API token obtained from @BotFather.

mode.label: Connection Mode
mode.description: How to connect to the Telegram server.

proxy.label: Proxy
proxy.description: Proxy for Telegram API access. Leave empty to use the global network proxy.

allowed_user_ids.label: Allowed User IDs
allowed_user_ids.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Leave empty for no restriction.

group_trigger_keyword.label: Group Trigger Keyword
group_trigger_keyword.description: Keyword to trigger a reply in group chat (besides @mention and /ask).

magi_user_id.label: Magi User ID
magi_user_id.description: The internal Magi user identity to map to.
